allow: Bash(dpkg -l | grep -E "xvfb|pyqt5" 2>/dev/null || echo "Need to check packages")
Bash(python3 -c "import pymupdf; doc = pymupdf.open\(\); print\('PyMuPDF version:', pymupdf.__doc__.split\(\)[1] if pymupdf.__doc__ else 'unknown'\)")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pymupdf
import re

pdf_path = "demo/GB 7718-2011预包装食品标签通则.pdf"
doc = pymupdf.open\(pdf_path\)

# GBT_PATTERNS L2 模式
l2_pattern = re.compile\(r'^\(\\d+\\.\\d+\)\(\\s+[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]\)', re.UNICODE\)

print\("检查 3.7 和 3.8 的匹配情况："\)
page = doc[2]  # 第3页
blocks = page.get_text\("blocks"\)

for block in blocks:
    x0, y0, x1, y1, text, block_no, block_type = block
    text = text.strip\(\).replace\('\\n', ' '\)
    
    if text.startswith\('3.7'\) or text.startswith\('3.8'\):
        match = l2_pattern.match\(text\)
        print\(f"文本: {text[:60]}"\)
        print\(f"匹配: {match is not None}"\)
        if match:
            print\(f"  组1: {match.group\(1\)}"\)
            print\(f"  组2: {match.group\(2\)}"\)
        print\(\)

doc.close\(\)
EOF)
Bash(python3 -m py_compile pdfviewer/ui/viewer_widget.py && echo "✓ 语法检查通过")
